TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Sapah, title = Sapah, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sapah} }

S.FORM: == Sapah == Sapah Truku o niqan tama,bubu,laqi.
S.PHON: == sapaħ == sapaħ tɾuku o niqan tama,bubu,laqi.

S.PHON: == sapaħ == sapaħ tɾuku o niqan tama,bubu,laqi.
